essential_assertions.text: assert(sum(a_spec) - m as int <= (a_spec.len() - 1) * (m as int)) by(nonlinear_arith) requires sum(a_spec) <= a_spec.len() * (m as int), m as int >= 0, a_spec.len() >= 1;
